_publications._publicationTitle: Modulation of Ras signaling alters the toxicity of hydroquinone, a benzene metabolite and component of cigarette smoke.

_contextSnippet: Lineage-marker-negative (Lin-) BM was used as a starting population for in vitro erythropoietic MN experiments, and terminal erythropoiesis progressed normally
details: Successfully used to isolate lineage-marker-negative bone marrow cells for in vitro erythropoietic micronucleus experiments
